description_long: This object is a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and a long, slender tail. Its plumage is predominantly dark, with shades of greenish-black and hints of iridescence, especially along the wings and back. The beak is straight, narrow, and pointed, suitable for probing or picking. The wings are compact and held close to the body, while the tail feathers are elongated and taper to a subtle point. The legs are short and not prominently visible, suggesting a perching or ground-foraging bird. The overall appearance is sleek and adapted for agile movement in urban or park environments.
description: A sleek, dark-feathered bird with a long, pointed tail and a narrow, straight beak. Its plumage is iridescent greenish-black, giving it a streamlined and agile look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, streamlined profile, and long, pointed tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow beak and the compact, rounded chest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the length of the tail and the smooth contour of the back.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the tail's pointed shape and the symmetry of the wings and body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Iridescent solid with subtle mottling and slight gradient on wings and back
